series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains information related to the preparation and completion of a biennial audit of Ohio State Patrol’s (OSP) criminal intelligence function. Records may include audit checklists, reports of evaluation and recommended actions, documentation of submission to system in compliance with project criteria pursuant to 28 CFR 23, and strategy for improvement and implementation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in Intelligence Unit’s data-system two years, provided that biennial information audit is complete and reported
